::: {#exr-u1-savings-perc}
### Savings and Values

For every £200 Mrs. Joy earns, she saves £34.

a) Work out £34 as a percentage of £200.  
b) Last month she earned £1000. How much does she save?

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 🔍 View Solution

a) $\frac{34}{200} \times 100 = \mathbf{17\%}$  
b) $17\%$ of $£1000 = 0.17 \times 1000 = \mathbf{£170}$
:::

::: {.exercise-meta}
[Topic: Savings]{.badge .topic-badge}
[Skills: Values as Percentages]{.badge .skill-badge}
:::
:::
